title: AI Filmmaking Workflow: How To Create AI Videos With Full Automation
summary: AI Master demonstrates a complete filmmaking workflow using TopView Drama Studio to create a cinematic short film with consistent characters, dialogue, and professional lighting from a simple text pitch, requiring no crew. The tool handles story generation, character design, lighting setup, and final rendering within a single platform.
